title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: Assessment: **very unlikely the local runtime key matches the credited UI key shown in API settings**; at most it may match a different account/workspace key. - Local API calls consistently fail at task creation with `code:8, "credit limit exceeded"` (with profile and without profile), which is incompatible with the credited-key hypothesis. [with-profile.body.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/manus-live-verify-20260318/with-profile.body.json) [no-profile.body.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/manus-live-verify-20260318/no-profile.body.json) - The same local auth context can still read a prior task (`HTTP 200`), so this is not “invalid key,” it is “key valid but wrong credit context.” [prior-task.headers.txt](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/manus-live-verify-20260318/prior-task.headers.txt) - Runtime can silently pick a different key source (`MANUS_API_KEY` before `MANUS_MCP_API_KEY`), so key-origin mismatch remains the most plausible mechanism. [manus-api-client.js#L55](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/manus-api-client.js#L55) If your new screenshot’s visible key fingerprints do not equal the known local fingerprint, that is a definitive non-match.
